retrieved_result: Overview Overview OPM works with your Agency's personnel and payroll office to process your annuity claim. Regardless of the type of retirement, there are actions your personnel office must take in order to process your retirement claim. You can help reduce delays in processing by submitting your application
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses retirement claims processing and is not related to database query optimization.
